🧭 Career Guidance Hub

Expert roadmaps, interview tips, skill resources, and everything you need to crack placements and build your dream career in India

📍 Career Roadmaps

Choose Your Career Path

Step-by-step learning roadmaps created by industry experts and IIT/NIT alumni

AI / Machine Learning

Build intelligent systems that learn and adapt

  • Python & Mathematics Fundamentals
  • Statistics & Probability
  • Machine Learning Algorithms
  • Deep Learning & Neural Networks
  • NLP / Computer Vision
  • MLOps & Deployment
View AI Jobs

Full Stack Web Development

Build modern web applications end to end

  • HTML, CSS, JavaScript
  • React / Vue / Angular
  • Node.js / Python Backend
  • Databases (SQL & NoSQL)
  • REST APIs & GraphQL
  • DevOps & Deployment
View Dev Jobs

Data Science & Analytics

Turn data into actionable insights

  • Python / R Programming
  • SQL & Data Wrangling
  • Statistical Analysis
  • Data Visualization (Tableau/Power BI)
  • Machine Learning Basics
  • Big Data Tools (Spark, Hadoop)
View Data Jobs

Cloud & DevOps

Architect and manage cloud infrastructure

  • Linux & Networking Basics
  • AWS / Azure / GCP Fundamentals
  • Docker & Kubernetes
  • CI/CD Pipelines
  • Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
  • Monitoring & Security
View Cloud Jobs

Mobile App Development

Create apps for iOS and Android

  • Dart / Swift / Kotlin
  • Flutter / React Native
  • UI/UX for Mobile
  • State Management
  • APIs & Backend Integration
  • App Store Deployment
View Mobile Jobs

Cybersecurity

Protect systems and data from threats

  • Networking & OS Fundamentals
  • Security Concepts & Frameworks
  • Ethical Hacking & Pen Testing
  • SIEM & Incident Response
  • Cloud Security
  • Certifications (CEH, CISSP)
View Security Jobs
🎤 Interview Prep

Crack Any Interview

Proven strategies to ace campus placements, off-campus drives, FAANG interviews & service-based company rounds

Technical Interview Guide

Data Structures & Algorithms: Master arrays, trees, graphs, DP. Practice on LeetCode, GeeksforGeeks, CodeChef & HackerRank.

System Design: Learn scalability, databases, caching, load balancing. Read "Designing Data-Intensive Apps".

Campus Placement Tips: Prepare for aptitude rounds (Amcat, CoCubes), coding tests on HackerEarth, group discussions, and HR rounds. Target WITCH companies (Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, TCS, HCL) as safety and product companies as reach.

Coding Tips: Always clarify requirements, think aloud, test edge cases, optimize iteratively.

Behavioral Interview Guide

STAR Method: Structure answers as Situation → Task → Action → Result.

Common Questions: "Tell me about yourself", "Why this company?", "Greatest strength/weakness?"

Tips: Research the company, prepare 5-7 stories, show enthusiasm, ask thoughtful questions.

Interview Day Checklist

✅ Research the company and interviewer
✅ Review the job description thoroughly
✅ Prepare questions to ask them
✅ Test your tech setup (for virtual interviews)
✅ Dress professionally
✅ Arrive 10 minutes early
✅ Bring copies of your resume
✅ Follow up with a thank-you email

📚 Learning Resources

Top Platforms to Learn Skills

Curated free and paid resources to accelerate your learning journey

GeeksforGeeks

India's #1 DSA & placement prep platform

NPTEL

Free IIT/IISc courses with certificates

Internshala

India's top internship & training platform

CodeChef

Competitive programming & contests

LeetCode

Coding problems for FAANG interview prep

Coursera

IIT, Stanford, Google courses (financial aid for India)

freeCodeCamp

Free web dev & data science certifications

Udemy

Affordable courses (starts ₹299 in India)

HackerEarth

Hiring challenges & coding assessments

Kaggle

Data science competitions & datasets

roadmap.sh

Community-driven developer roadmaps

GitHub

Open-source projects & portfolio building
